mapper.select: SELECT review_id AS reviewId, store_id AS storeId, user_id AS userId, menu_id AS menuId, rating AS rating, content AS content, picture AS picture, created_data AS createdData FROM review WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.store_id AS storeId, r.menu_id AS menuId, r.rating AS rating, r.content AS content, r.picture AS picture, r.created_data AS createdData, u.id AS userIdName, m.name AS menuName FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN menu m ON r.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE r.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY r.created_data DESC

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.store_id AS storeId, r.menu_id AS menuId, r.rating AS rating, r.content AS content, r.picture AS picture, r.created_data AS createdData, u.id AS userIdName, m.name AS menuName FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN menu m ON r.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_data DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( store_id, user_id, menu_id, rating, content, picture, created_data ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{userId}, #{menuId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{picture}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET rating = #{rating}, content = #{content}, picture = #{picture} WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.menu_id AS menuId, m.name AS menuName FROM menu m WHERE m.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY m.menu_id
